title: FIFA World Cup 2026 — Engineered Match Dataset
subtitle: ELO, rolling form, H2H & squad values — WC 2026 ML prediction dataset
description: Pre-engineered features for men's international football match outcome prediction. Includes ELO ratings, rolling form, H2H history, squad market values, and model metadata. Companion to the FIFA WC 2026 ML Analysis notebook.

resources.description: Main feature table. One row per team per match (two rows per game). Covers men's international football from 2000 to 2025 across World Cups, Euros, qualifiers, friendlies, Copa América, AFCON and Nations League. Outcome label is from the perspective of the 'team' column. Use match_date for temporal train/val/test splits.

fields.name: match_id
fields.description: Unique match identifier: YYYYMMDD_HomeTeam_AwayTeam (string)

fields.name: match_date
fields.description: Date of the match (datetime)

fields.name: competition
fields.description: Competition or tournament name (string)

fields.name: tournament
fields.description: Tournament name as recorded in raw international results (string)

fields.name: tournament_category
fields.description: Tournament category: world_cup | euro | qualifier | friendly | other (string)

fields.name: team
fields.description: The team this row represents (canonical name, string)

fields.name: opponent
fields.description: The opposing team (canonical name, string)

fields.name: goals_for
fields.description: Full-time goals scored by team (int)

fields.name: goals_against
fields.description: Full-time goals conceded by team (int)

fields.name: is_home
fields.description: 1 if team played at home venue, 0 otherwise (binary int)

fields.name: is_neutral
fields.description: 1 if match was played at a neutral venue (binary int)

fields.name: stage
fields.description: Match stage: group | round_of_16 | quarter_final | semi_final | final (string)

fields.name: is_knockout
fields.description: 1 if match was a knockout stage game (binary int)

fields.name: outcome
fields.description: Target label from team perspective: 0=Loss, 1=Draw, 2=Win (int)

fields.name: points
fields.description: Points earned: 3=Win, 1=Draw, 0=Loss (int)

fields.name: odds_home
fields.description: Bookmaker odds for home team win (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: odds_draw
fields.description: Bookmaker odds for draw (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: odds_away
fields.description: Bookmaker odds for away team win (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: polymarket_prob_home
fields.description: Polymarket-implied probability for home team win (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: polymarket_prob_away
fields.description: Polymarket-implied probability for away team win (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: shots
fields.description: Total shots taken by team (int, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: shots_on_target
fields.description: Shots on target by team (int, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: xg
fields.description: Expected Goals (xG) created by team (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: corners
fields.description: Corners awarded to team (int, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: fouls
fields.description: Fouls committed by team (int, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: possession_pct
fields.description: Possession percentage of team (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: team_rest_days
fields.description: Days since team previous match (float)

fields.name: opp_rest_days
fields.description: Days since opponent previous match (float)

fields.name: rest_days_diff
fields.description: team_rest_days minus opp_rest_days (float)

fields.name: form_5
fields.description: Rolling points sum over team last 5 matches before this game (float)

fields.name: goals_for_avg_5
fields.description: Rolling average goals scored per game over last 5 matches (float)

fields.name: goals_against_avg_5
fields.description: Rolling average goals conceded per game over last 5 matches (float)

fields.name: shots_avg_5
fields.description: Rolling average shots over last 5 matches (float)

fields.name: shots_on_target_avg_5
fields.description: Rolling average shots on target over last 5 matches (float)

fields.name: xg_avg_5
fields.description: Rolling average Expected Goals (xG) over last 5 matches (float)

fields.name: corners_avg_5
fields.description: Rolling average corners over last 5 matches (float)

fields.name: fouls_avg_5
fields.description: Rolling average fouls over last 5 matches (float)

fields.name: possession_pct_avg_5
fields.description: Rolling average possession percentage over last 5 matches (float)

fields.name: form_10
fields.description: Rolling points sum over team last 10 matches before this game (float)

fields.name: goals_for_avg_10
fields.description: Rolling average goals scored per game over last 10 matches (float)

fields.name: goals_against_avg_10
fields.description: Rolling average goals conceded per game over last 10 matches (float)

fields.name: shots_avg_10
fields.description: Rolling average shots over last 10 matches (float)

fields.name: shots_on_target_avg_10
fields.description: Rolling average shots on target over last 10 matches (float)

fields.name: xg_avg_10
fields.description: Rolling average Expected Goals (xG) over last 10 matches (float)

fields.name: corners_avg_10
fields.description: Rolling average corners over last 10 matches (float)

fields.name: fouls_avg_10
fields.description: Rolling average fouls over last 10 matches (float)

fields.name: possession_pct_avg_10
fields.description: Rolling average possession percentage over last 10 matches (float)

fields.name: tournament_form_5
fields.description: Rolling points sum over last 5 matches in the same tournament category (float)

fields.name: tournament_goals_for_avg_5
fields.description: Rolling average goals scored in same tournament category over last 5 matches (float)

fields.name: tournament_goals_against_avg_5

fields.name: h2h_matches
fields.description: Number of prior head-to-head meetings (max 10 recent) (int)

fields.name: h2h_wins
fields.description: Head-to-head wins for team in prior meetings (int)

fields.name: h2h_draws
fields.description: Head-to-head draws in prior meetings (int)

fields.name: h2h_losses
fields.description: Head-to-head losses for team in prior meetings (int)

fields.name: h2h_goals_for
fields.description: Total goals scored by team in H2H meetings (float)

fields.name: h2h_goals_against
fields.description: Total goals conceded by team in H2H meetings (float)

fields.name: team_elo
fields.description: Team pre-match ELO rating (float)

fields.name: opponent_elo
fields.description: Opponent pre-match ELO rating (float)

fields.name: elo_diff
fields.description: team_elo minus opponent_elo — single strongest predictor (float)

fields.name: implied_prob_win
fields.description: Bookmaker-implied win probability (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: implied_prob_draw
fields.description: Bookmaker-implied draw probability (float)

fields.name: implied_prob_loss
fields.description: Bookmaker-implied loss probability (float)

fields.name: implied_prob_diff
fields.description: implied_prob_win minus implied_prob_loss (float)

fields.name: polymarket_prob_win
fields.description: Polymarket-implied win probability (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: polymarket_prob_draw
fields.description: Polymarket-implied draw probability (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: polymarket_prob_loss
fields.description: Polymarket-implied loss probability (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: polymarket_prob_diff
fields.description: polymarket_prob_win minus polymarket_prob_loss (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: tournament_year
fields.description: Year of the tournament (int)

fields.name: fbref_goals_per90
fields.description: Team average goals per 90 from FBref (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: fbref_xg_per90
fields.description: Team average Expected Goals (xG) per 90 from FBref (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: fbref_assists_per90
fields.description: Team average assists per 90 from FBref (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: squad_market_value
fields.description: Team squad market value in € millions from Transfermarkt (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: opponent_squad_market_value
fields.description: Opponent squad market value in € millions from Transfermarkt (float, NaN if unavailable)

fields.name: squad_value_diff
fields.description: squad_market_value minus opponent squad market value (float)

fields.name: form_diff_5
fields.description: form_5 minus opponent form_5 — form advantage metric (float)

fields.name: xg_diff_5
fields.description: xg_avg_5 minus opponent xg_avg_5 (float)

fields.name: form_diff_10
fields.description: form_10 minus opponent form_10 (float)

fields.name: xg_diff_10
fields.description: xg_avg_10 minus opponent xg_avg_10 (float)

fields.name: confederation
fields.description: FIFA confederation of team (string)

fields.name: opp_confederation
fields.description: FIFA confederation of opponent (string)

fields.name: same_confederation
fields.description: 1 if both teams from the same confederation (binary int)

fields.name: stage_encoded
fields.description: Integer-encoded stage label (int)

resources.description: Aggregated squad market values per national team per year, sourced from the transfermarkt-datasets project (github.com/dcaribou/transfermarkt-datasets). Values are in millions of Euros. Join to match_features.csv on team name + year(match_date) to add the squad_market_value feature.

fields.name: team
fields.description: Canonical national team name (string)

fields.name: tournament_year
fields.description: Column tournament_year

fields.name: squad_market_value
fields.description: Column squad_market_value

resources.description: Mapping of canonical national team names to their Transfermarkt internal club IDs. Used to join squad valuations when fetching fresh data from the Transfermarkt API. Format: { "Argentina": 3437, "Brazil": 3439, ... }

Ordered list of feature column names used during XGBoost model training. Load this to ensure your feature matrix columns are in the correct order when making predictions. Format: [ "is_home", "is_neutral", ... ]
Sorted list of all 200+ canonical national team names seen during model training. Use for team name validation and lookup. Format: [ "Afghanistan", "Albania", ... ]

Validation and test set performance metrics from the trained XGBoost + calibration pipeline. Validation = 2018 FIFA World Cup (64 matches). Test = 2022 FIFA World Cup (64 matches, held-out). Includes accuracy, log_loss, and Brier score.
